---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement to Hsiwu
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

### Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Is there something the current design
cannot do that you wish it could?

### Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed change or addition.

### Design Constraints Checklist

Please confirm that your proposal respects these core design constraints:

- [ ] **No MCU / firmware** — the solution uses only analog/digital logic,
      no microcontroller, no programmable logic, no embedded software
- [ ] **Power budget** — the solution fits within the single-cell 3.7V LiPo
      and MT3608 boost converter capability (~500mA peak output)
- [ ] **Weight budget** — the solution does not add significant mass that
      would reduce available lift (reference: 17.81 g total, ~0.16 N lift)
- [ ] **Manufacturability** — the solution can be manufactured with standard
      tools: FDM 3D printing, FR-4 PCB fabrication, hand soldering

### Domain

- [ ] Electronics (schematic / PCB / components)
- [ ] Mechanical (CAD / structure / linkages)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: _______________

### Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you think about, and why did you reject them?

### Additional Context

Sketches, reference links, papers, or anything else relevant.
